mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
product.DOCUMENT_NO objectNo, product.DOCUMENT_NM objectNm, FN_GET_CD_NM('objectClassCd2', DOC_CLASS_CD2, #{sessionLang}) AS objectClassNm2
product.SW_NO objectNo, product.SW_NM objectNm, FN_GET_CD_NM('objectClassCd2', SW_CLASS_CD2, #{sessionLang}) AS objectClassNm2
, mapping.REV_NO oldRevNo , product.REV_NO revNo , product.APPLY_HOGI_NO , product.CALL_ID , product.ECN_NO , product.PROCESS_TYPE_CD , product.DESCRIPTION , product.OBJECT_ID , status.USER_CD userCd , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = status.USER_CD) userNm , status.DEPT_CD deptCd , (SELECT DEPT_NM FROM DOCS_DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD = status.DEPT_CD) deptNm , status.CURRENT_COUNT , #{objectType} objectType , product.total_page_cnt AS totalPageCnt , depInfo.DEPLOY_ACCEPT_YN AS deployAcceptYn
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT product JOIN ( SELECT DOCUMENT_NO, MAX(REV_NO) AS REV_NO FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT GROUP BY DOCUMENT_NO ) grouped ON product.DOCUMENT_NO = grouped.DOCUMENT_NO AND product.REV_NO = grouped.REV_NO
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW product JOIN ( SELECT SW_NO, MAX(REV_NO) AS REV_NO FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW GROUP BY SW_NO ) grouped ON product.SW_NO = grouped.SW_NO AND product.REV_NO = grouped.REV_NO
INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(REQUEST_NO) as REQUEST_NO, MAX(OBJECT_ID) AS OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NO, DEPLOY_USER_CD, DEPLOY_DEPT_CD, MIN(DEPLOY_ACCEPT_YN) as DEPLOY_ACCEPT_YN FROM DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO WHERE DESTROY_STATUS_CD != 'ALL_DESTROY' GROUP BY OBJECT_NO, DEPLOY_USER_CD, DEPLOY_DEPT_CD ) depInfo
ON product.DOCUMENT_NO = depInfo.OBJECT_NO
ON product.SW_NO = depInfo.OBJECT_NO
INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping ON depInfo.REQUEST_NO = mapping.REQUEST_NO AND depInfo.OBJECT_NO = mapping.OBJECT_NO INNER JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_STATUS status ON product.DOCUMENT_NO = status.OBJECT_NO AND depInfo.DEPLOY_DEPT_CD = status.DEPT_CD AND depInfo.DEPLOY_USER_CD = status.USER_CD INNER JOIN (
SELECT OBJECT_ID, MAX(FILE_NO) AS fileNo FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE GROUP BY OBJECT_ID
SELECT OBJECT_ID, MAX(FILE_NO) AS fileNo FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE GROUP BY OBJECT_ID
) fileInfo ON product.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID ) WHERE 1=1 AND (
(deptCd = #{param.deptCd} AND objectNo = #{param.objectNo})
)

SELECT depInfo.OBJECT_NO, depInfo.DEPLOY_USER_CD, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = depInfo.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserNm, FN_GET_USER_FULL_NM(depInfo.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserFullNm, #{objectType} AS objectType FROM DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO depInfo INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL requestDetail ON depInfo.REQUEST_NO = requestDetail.REQUEST_NO AND requestDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND requestDetail.ACTION_CD = 'APPROVAL' WHERE OBJECT_NO = #{objectNo} GROUP BY OBJECT_NO, DEPLOY_USER_CD

SELECT requestDetail.REQUEST_NO, product.OBJECT_ID, product.REV_NO, depInfo.DEPLOY_COUNT, depInfo.COPY, depInfo.DESTROY_COUNT, request.INSERT_USER_CD requestUserCd, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = request.INSERT_USER_CD) AS requestUserNm, requestDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD approvalUserCd, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = requestDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS approvalUserNm, request.INSERT_DT requestDt, requestDetail.ACTION_DT deployDt FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT product INNER JOIN DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO depInfo ON product.OBJECT_ID = depInfo.OBJECT_ID INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL requestDetail ON depInfo.REQUEST_NO = requestDetail.REQUEST_NO AND requestDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND requestDetail.ACTION_CD = 'APPROVAL' INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST request ON requestDetail.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO WHERE product.DOCUMENT_NO = #{objectNo} AND depInfo.DEPLOY_USER_CD = #{deployUserCd} ORDER BY requestDetail.REQUEST_NO DESC, product.REV_NO DESC
